briefs.title: Assisted Living Rental Units Removed from BC Residential Tenancy Act Protection
briefs.summary: As of Feb 23, 2026, rental units inside assisted living residences are no longer covered by BC's Residential Tenancy Act, meaning standard tenant protections no longer apply to those residents.
briefs.action_required: Review any assisted living rental units you manage and update agreements to reflect they are no longer under the Residential Tenancy Act.

key_dates.label: BC assisted living rental unit exemption from Residential Tenancy Act takes effect
